growth_records.strain: MAG (uncultured; measured in situ within I. basta holobiont)
growth_records.medium: Sulfate-free artificial seawater (SFASW) or 0.2 um filtered natural seawater (FSW), sponge-explant incubation +/- taurine

up.units: nmol C min-1 g-1 sponge wet wt (+/-0.3 SE)
up.method: 13C-taurine tracer + whole-sponge EA-IRMS; holobiont-level, not normalized to symbiont biomass

up.units: nmol N min-1 g-1 sponge wet wt (+/-0.2 SE)

sec.units: endpoint 590 +/- 89 uM SO4 2- (SE) in SFASW +100 uM taurine incubation; ~full recovery of added taurine-sulfonate as sulfate; not expressed as a per-time rate
sec.method: ion chromatography of SFASW incubations; oxidation of taurine-derived sulfite to sulfate for export

sec.units: not quantified as rate; taurine-N dissimilated to ammonium then oxidized to nitrite by co-symbiont Ca. Nitrosospongia ianthellae
sec.method: 15N tracer; ammonia oxidation inhibited at >=100 uM NH4+

product_yields.sulfate_from_taurine: ~1 mol sulfate per mol taurine sulfonate (near-full recovery of +100 uM taurine as ~590 uM total SO4 in SFASW; note baseline SFASW SO4 subtraction implied)

growth_records.cite: Florian U. Moeller et al. The functional roles of marine sponge-associated symbionts in taurine dissimilation and biogenic sulfur cycling. The ISME Journal (2023). DOI:10.1038/s41396-023-01420-1. [PMC10356861]
growth_records.snippet: we were able to estimate uptake rates of taurine-derived C and N assimilated into whole I. basta holobiont biomass and obtained values of 1.38 +/- 0.3 nmol C min-1 g-1 sponge wet wt (+/-SE) and 0.74 +/- 0.2 nmol N min-1 g-1 sponge wet wt (+
growth_records.notes: CAVEAT: these are HOLOBIONT-level rates (per g sponge wet weight), driven by the uncultured gammaproteobacterial symbiont 'Ca. Taurinisymbion ianthellae', NOT rates of an isolated prokaryote culture and NOT normalized to microbial gDW - so they are not directly usable as GEM exchange constraints in mmol/gDW/h without biomass conversion. Included per exhaustive-capture mandate. Measured uptake (assimilation) rates: 1.38 nmol C/min/g and 0.74 nmol N/min/g sponge wet wt from 13C/15N-taurine EA-IRMS. Sulfate export reported as endpoint concentration (590 uM) not a rate; ~full stoichiometric recovery of 100 uM added taurine sulfonate as sulfate. Ammonium export inferred from 15N. No growth rate, doubling time, or pH reported; temperature 25 C, dark, stirred oxic seawater incubation. Symbiont also predicted to import DMSP (demethylation + cleavage) from metaproteogenomics - no rate.
